component.name: MDreader
component.summary: 美观的 Markdown 阅读器

description.p: MDreader renders Markdown into a beautifully typeset reading view with syntax highlighting, tables, math (KaTeX), Mermaid diagrams, task lists, and light/dark themes. Register it as a system handler for .md files and keep an auto-cached, searchable, date-grouped library of everything you've opened.
This is the native Linux build (GTK4 + WebKitGTK6), at feature parity with the macOS app.
Initial Linux release: GTK4 + WebKitGTK6 port — render core, file opener, cache layer, content management (library/outline/zoom), PDF export, external editor, and About/preferences.
